slides.title: It may not just be what you eat. It's *when*.
slides.sub: A consistent daily eating window can support metabolic health. Here is the calm version.

slides.title: Keep a steady window
slides.body: Eating within a consistent window, often *about ten to twelve hours*, may support metabolic health for many people.

slides.title: Late nights fight your clock
slides.body: Your body runs on a clock. Eating late, close to bed, *works against that rhythm* and your sleep.

slides.title: Give the body a rest
slides.body: A longer overnight gap may *give the body a rest* between meals, time to recover instead of always digesting.

slides.title: Keep it sustainable
slides.body: This is not an extreme fast. Pick a window you *can keep for life*, on most ordinary days.

slides.title: Front-load the day
slides.body: Eat earlier and finish sooner when you can. A bigger breakfast and *an earlier dinner* fit the rhythm.

slides.title: Build a rhythm that *lasts*.
slides.body: Vibe Health turns your meals, sleep and movement into one simple daily plan, so a steady routine is easy to keep.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
When you eat may matter, not just what. A consistent daily eating window can support metabolic health. ⏳

Keep it gentle: a window of about ten to twelve hours, finishing earlier in the evening. Sustainable beats extreme. 🔖

Vibe Health turns your meals and sleep into one calm plan → link in bio.
youtube_title: Why When You Eat May Matter for Longevity
